name: Project Starter
description: Guided skill for starting a new project from idea through architecture into first build plan.
purpose: Turn a vague idea into a grounded project plan without jumping straight to code unless asked.
requiredContext: Whether the project is web, API, CLI, or local app
Whether this is a learning project or deploy target
missingContextQuestions: Do you have a preferred stack, host, or app type?
Is this a learning project or a real user-facing product?
Should the plan assume local machine or cloud deployment?

outputContract.format: Structured project plan with architecture and MVP steps.

positiveExamples: Start a new pharmacy marketplace project.
I want to build a local task app.
Scaffold a new Deepgram voice project.
Create an architecture plan for a ToolSmart SaaS MVP.
What is the cheapest stack for a one-page project?
negativeExamples: Rewrite this email to my manager.
What should HR do with an I-9 TNC?
Score this GRC role for me.

evaluationPrompts.input: Start a new pharmacy marketplace project.
evaluationPrompts.reason: Positive project-start request with clear new-project vocabulary.

evaluationPrompts.input: I want to build a local task app.
evaluationPrompts.reason: Positive bootstrap request without existing repo scaffold.

evaluationPrompts.input: Scaffold a new Deepgram voice project.
evaluationPrompts.reason: Positive scaffold request with clear new-project intent.

evaluationPrompts.input: Create an architecture plan for a ToolSmart SaaS MVP.
evaluationPrompts.reason: Positive architecture-planning request for a new product.

evaluationPrompts.input: What is the cheapest stack for a one-page project?
evaluationPrompts.reason: Weak bootstrap question still belongs to project-starter.

evaluationPrompts.input: Rewrite this email to my manager.
evaluationPrompts.reason: Writing request should not route to project-starter.
Career/writing request should not route to project-starter.

evaluationPrompts.input: Add a route in my existing app.
evaluationPrompts.reason: Existing project change request belongs to build-orchestrator.

evaluationPrompts.input: Score this GRC role for me.
evaluationPrompts.reason: Career screening request should not route to project-starter.
Task creation is not project bootstrap.

safetyRules: Keep planning separate from implementation until the user asks to build.
Do not create folders, scaffold files, or install packages without explicit approval.
Call out assumptions about stack, hosting, and data storage.
